description: Completion signal emitted by agent_group after task execution
author: builder_agent
title: Signal Supervisor Complete
tldr: Defines signal for signal supervisor complete, with validation gates and integration points.
purpose: Emitted by agent_group after task completion. Consumed by spawn_monitor.ps1 and orchestrator for wave tracking.
emit:
from records.core.python.signal_writer import write_signal
write_signal("edison", "complete", 9.0)
# Writes to .claude/signals/edison_complete_9.0.json
status_values:
| Status | Meaning | Action |
|--------|---------|--------|
| complete | Task done, quality passed | Collect + next batch |
| error | Task failed | Log + retry or escalate |
| progress | Still working (heartbeat) | Wait, check stuck timer |
pipeline_integration: Created via 8F pipeline from F1-Focus through F8-Furnish
Scored by cex_score across three structural layers
Compiled by cex_compile for structural validation
Retrieved by cex_retriever for context injection
Evolved by cex_evolve when quality regresses below target
properties:
| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Kind | `signal` |
| Pillar | P12 |
| Domain |  |
| Pipeline | 8F (F1-F8) |
| Scorer | cex_score.py |
| Compiler | cex_compile.py |
| Retriever | cex_retriever.py |
| Quality target | 9.0+ |
| Density target | 0.85+ |
